description: Issue #212 adversarial planted case: same combined-hunk bypass as reject-combined-hunk-no-exclusivity-exempt-first, with the order reversed -- the non-exempt 'Institution shall be the exclusive provider' violation comes FIRST, and the exempt phrase 'non-exclusive' comes SECOND in the same hunk. Verifies span-level exemption is order-independent.

expected_issues.section_ref: Counterparty introduces exclusivity in either direction.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Institution shall be the exclusive provider of interns to Exos nationwide. This Agreement is non-exclusive as to placements in Arizona.
planted_variation.notes: Issue #212 repro (order: violation first, exempt phrase second). Confirms the fix is order-independent -- 'the exclusive provider' span is not inside the 'non-exclusive' exempt span regardless of which sentence comes first in the hunk.

detector_expectation.rationale: Span-level exemption is order-independent: 'the exclusive provider of interns to Exos nationwide' is a separate, non-exempt span from 'non-exclusive' regardless of sentence order, and must fire no-exclusivity via the 'exclusive' trigger_term.
